hype_cycle.description: Gartner Hype Cycle phase detection thresholds

innovation_trigger.description: High technical activity, minimal capital/enterprise attention

peak_expectations.description: Maximum hype, capital flooding in, technical novelty plateauing

trough_disillusionment.description: Attention and capital receding, reality check phase

slope_enlightenment.description: Enterprise adoption beginning, practical applications emerging

plateau_productivity.description: Stable market, mainstream adoption, all signals consolidated
